description: Create / draw up / establish / prepare a documentation artefact.
Keep up-to-date / keep available / preserve over a retention period.
Make available / provide / share with another party.
Observe in operation; collect post-market or runtime data.
Notify / submit a report to an authority or other party.
Evaluate / analyse / test against a defined criterion.
Track / log / version-control changes to an artefact.
Specify intended use / contraindications / out-of-scope conditions.
Grant authorisation / certify / sign off on a state transition.
Store under defined access controls and retention period.
Provide in a language accessible to the recipient (deployer, user).
